description: Population of beings needing Vajrasattva's karmic purification and transformation of negativity

targets.name: Those in the 49-Day Bardo Period
targets.description: Beings who have died within the past 49 days and are in the intermediate state (bardo) before next rebirth
targets.intention: May Vajrasattva's hundred-syllable mantra purify the karma of the deceased, may they recognize the clear light, may they attain liberation or a favorable rebirth

additional_data.mantra: Om Vajrasattva Samaya Manu Palaya Vajrasattva Teno Patista Drido Me Bhava Suto Kayo Me Bhava Suvar Kayo Me Bhava Anu Rakto Me Bhava Sarva Siddhi Me Pra Yaccha Sarva Karma Su Cha Me Tsi Tam Shri Ya Ku Ru Hung Ha Ha Ha Ha Hoh Bhagavan Sarva Tathagata Vajra Ma Me Munca Vajra Bhava Maha Samaya Sattva Ah
additional_data.practice_note: 100,000 mantra accumulations is a foundational ngondro purification practice

targets.name: Practitioners with Karmic Obstacles
targets.description: Spiritual practitioners of all traditions experiencing obstacles, dullness, or stagnation in their practice due to karmic obscurations
targets.intention: May all sincere practitioners find their obstacles purified, may the path open before them, may realization dawn effortlessly

targets.name: Those in Correctional Facilities
targets.description: All beings incarcerated in prisons, detention centers, and correctional institutions worldwide
targets.intention: May all beings in correctional facilities find remorse, purification, and the causes for a wholesome new life, may they find inner freedom regardless of outer circumstance

data_sources: Institute for Crime & Justice Policy Research

targets.name: Soldiers and Veterans Processing Trauma
targets.description: Active military personnel and veterans carrying the karmic weight and trauma of warfare and conflict
targets.intention: May all soldiers and veterans find purification of trauma, may they be healed of PTSD, may they find peace of heart and reconciliation

additional_data.estimated_count: Tens of millions of active military and veterans globally

targets.name: Beings in the Lower Realms
targets.description: Per traditional Buddhist cosmology, beings suffering in the hell realms, hungry ghost (preta) realms, and animal realms - experiencing intense suffering with little means to purify their own karma
targets.intention: May Vajrasattva's blessing reach all beings in the lower realms, may their suffering cease, may their negative karma be purified, may they attain precious human rebirth

additional_data.cosmology: Six realms of samsara per traditional Buddhist teaching
additional_data.dedication_note: Practitioners dedicate merit specifically for beings in lower realms who cannot practice for themselves

targets.name: Survivors of Abuse and Violence
targets.description: Beings carrying the karmic wounds of abuse - physical, sexual, emotional, or psychological
targets.intention: May all survivors find purification of suffering without erasure of dignity, may they find safety, healing, and the restoration of their wholeness

additional_data.estimated_count: Over 1 billion experience abuse in childhood or adulthood globally

targets.name: Those Consumed by Anger, Hatred, or Vengefulness
targets.description: Beings trapped in the afflictive emotions of anger, hatred, grudge-bearing, and desire for revenge
targets.intention: May the diamond wisdom of Vajrasattva cut through the chains of anger, may forgiveness and peace arise, may all hearts be liberated from hatred

additional_data.klesha: anger/hatred (one of the three root poisons)
